column2: # points to highlight (best + worst per day_type)
overall %>% group_by(day_type) %>% slice_min(otp, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)
# add x padding so rings never clip
p <- ggplot(overall, aes(month, otp, color = day_type, group = day_type, text = hover_text)) +
subtitle = "Trips-weighted terminal on-time performance (weekday vs weekend)",
legend = list(orientation = "v", x = 1.02, y = 0.5, xanchor = "left", yanchor = "middle"),
